formatted_effects: The drug is reported to have effects associated with typical common benzodiazepines
oxazepam.name: oxazepam

properties.effects: The drug is reported to have effects associated with typical common benzodiazepines. Some of these effects include but are not limited to, amnesic, anxiolytic, anticonvulsant, hypnotic, and sedative.
properties.summary: A prescription benzodiazepine with intermediate duration and half life. A sedative and hypnotic which may cause lowered inhibitions and amnesia in higher doses.
